{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Yerin's Goldsigns
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] blaze with silver light.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] had gleaming red Goldsigns extended.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] uses Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] extended her Goldsigns behind her.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
